title: Traditional German Rye Bread Crumble
description: A twist on traditional German bread, this crumble recipe incorporates the flavors of rye and a citrusy twist.
instructions: Cut the rye bread into 1-inch cubes.
In a separate bowl, mix together citrusy crumble ingredients.
Roll out the flaky pastry to a thickness of 1/4 inch.
Cut the pastry into small squares and place on top of the bread cubes.
Dot the top of the pastry with butter.
Bake in the preheated oven for 20-25 minutes, or until golden brown.
Remove from the oven and let cool for 5 minutes.
Serve warm, topped with additional citrusy crumble if desired.
